violations.text: No person certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection. Per PIC, multiple people will enroll. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2026

Raw animal foods (Chicken and Beef) observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (deli meats and cheese) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2026
The condensate from the walk-in refrigeration unit is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2026
The walls in the basement has an accumulation of grease debris. Walls/floors must be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2026
The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH. Per PIC, application was mailed. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2024

The condensate from the walk-in refrigeration unit is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. PIC moved the condensate to a container while they wait for parts to get it to directly drain into drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2024
The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety certified with RIDOH. Application printed for PIC. New Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2024

Raw animal foods were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (deli meat, cheese) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Food relocated. Handout provided. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Establishment to wash, rinse, and sanitize after using the can opener (or at least once every 4 hours). Can opener was cleaned at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2024
The condensate from the walk-in refrigeration unit is draining into 3-bay sink. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2024

A large accumulation of rodent droppings were observed above the ceiling in the kitchen area. Establishment to vacuum/clean all droppings. Cleaning must occur when business is closed to ensure no potential contamination of surfaces below ceiling. Grease was observed on the wall in the basement area. Per PIC, basement will be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2024

There was no evidence that employees are required to report to the person in charge information about their health (illnesses, symptoms) as they relate to diseases that are transmissible through food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2023
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2023
Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. New Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2023

The facility is lacking a mop sink. At least one mop sink or one curbed cleaning facility equipped with a floor drain must be provided and conveniently located for the cleaning of mops or similar wet floor cleaning tools and for the disposal of mop water and similar liquid waste. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2023
The condensate from the walk-in refrigeration unit is draining into the 3-bay sink. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2023
